case_title: RENAE BROWN ET AL VS. BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,512.53 FILED BY BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BROWN, RENAE BROWN, EDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, RENAE BROWN, EDITH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, RENAE BROWN, EDITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BROWN, RENAE BROWN, EDITH PLAINTIFFS SUPPORTED THEIR CLAIM. DEFENDANTS DID NOT SUFFICIENTLY SUPPORT THEIR CROSS CLAIM WITH RESPECT TO BACK RENT, AND THE COURT COULD NOT DETERMINE THAT ASSERTED DAMAGES WERE NOT PRE-EXISTING OR NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 22, 2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 22, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, RENAE BROWN, EDITH AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00- SERVED NOV-20-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 22, 2015 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 22, 2015 BY JPT DAVID LAVINE., CLERK J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
